fields.useCase: Real-time claims fraud detection at FNOL (first notice of loss)
fields.teamSize: ~180 in IT; 6 data engineers, 3 data scientists, no ML engineer
fields.initiatives: Claims chatbot pilot shipped 2025; an ML triage PoC stalled at handover to operations
fields.skillNotes: Strong .NET/integration skills; ML experience concentrated in two people. No MLOps experience in-house.
fields.cultureNotes: Claims leadership is enthusiastic after the chatbot pilot; adjusters worry about being second-guessed by a model. Works councils must be consulted before go-live.
fields.processNotes: SIU referral process is documented and consistent across regions - a good automation anchor. Model-change process does not exist yet.
fields.stakeholderNotes: Sponsor: Head of Claims. Sceptic: SIU lead (worried about false positives creating rework). Data owner for claims: enterprise data office.
fields.recommendations: Hire or contract one MLOps engineer before build; co-design referral thresholds with the SIU lead; brief works councils in month 1.
